response.justification: A highly experienced senior/staff engineer whose technical skills strongly exceed the requirements of this entry-level role. TypeScript, Node.js, React, REST/web architecture, relational databases, and clean-architecture/TDD practices are all clearly demonstrated, and the candidate is Berlin-based which fits the on-site requirement. The core hesitation is fit rather than ability: someone with ~15 years of experience applying to a junior/mid IC role raises questions about salary expectations, long-term retention, and motivation. Worth an interview primarily to understand why they are targeting an entry-level position.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js, React, REST and web-architecture background
Berlin-based, matching the high on-site presence requirement
concerns: Significantly overqualified for an entry-level position
Database experience skews to MongoDB; PostgreSQL not explicitly shown
No Nest.js experience mentioned and unclear motivation for a junior role
